objective: Close the deterministic P04 mission dispatcher barrier, add evidence-bound observational non-numeric cost reconciliation, restore the 20000 total-token reservation for future roles, and resume the exact existing mission without repeating its transmitted Scout call.
executable_blocker: The current mission is deterministically stuck because the dispatcher can observe inactive before the queued unit starts, every successful provider parse returns null numeric cost while mission advance requires a number, and mission reservations incorrectly use 4096 total tokens instead of the accepted 20000 ceiling.
acceptance_commands: exact PR-head CI green and exact merge-head CI green
minimal exact Bridge deploy with rollback and stable Core/advisor/monitor postconditions
same mission advances without Scout replay or manual future-role start
stop_conditions: the current Scout call would need replay, replacement, relabeling as success, or an invented response
observational accounting would apply to UNKNOWN, missing tokens, missing provider receipt, or a numeric-cost-required scope
domain mutation, live action, D2/D3, new broker/writer/dispatcher, or authority expansion becomes necessary
current main, mission, call, request, provider receipt, or deployed runtime identity drifts before mutation
forbidden_scope: provider call repetition or new Scout identity
manual reserve or future role unit start
second broker, writer, dispatcher, daemon, listener, or broad refactor
Market/Security deploy, restart, canonical write, live trading/security, publication or promotion
force-push, history rewrite, secret/private payload publication, D2/D3 transfer
rollback: Restore the exact c46538a Core image, advisor script and unit binding while preserving the existing immutable mission, Scout FAILED_KNOWN call and all receipts; never roll back by rewriting the ledger.
